2605.21482.title: DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation
2605.21482.paper_summary: Deep research, in which an agent searches the open web, collects evidence, and derives an answer through extended reasoning, is a prominent use case for frontier language models. Frontier deep research products score high on existing benchmarks, making it difficult to distinguish their capabilities from current evaluation data alone. We introduce DeepWeb-Bench, a deep research benchmark that is substantially harder than existing benchmarks for the current frontier. Difficulty comes from three properties of the data itself: each task requires massive evidence collection, cross-source reconciliation, and long-horizon multi-step derivation. We represent these three sources of difficulty as four capability families (Retrieval, Derivation, Reasoning, and Calibration) and report results sliced by family. Every reference answer is accompanied by a source-provenance record with four disclosure levels and cross-source checks where available, making scores easier to audit against the underlying evidence. We evaluate DeepWeb-Bench on nine frontier models and report three findings: (1) retrieval is not the bottleneck, as retrieval failures account for only 12-14% of errors while derivation and calibration failures account for over 70%; (2) strong and weak models fail in qualitatively different ways, with strong models' errors dominated by incomplete derivation and weak models' by hallucinated precision; and (3) models exhibit genuine specialization across domains, with cross-model agreement of only rho = 0.61 and per-case disagreement reaching 18.8 percentage points. The public benchmark release includes the data, rubrics, and evaluation code.
2605.21482.paper_summary_zh: 深度研究，其中代理在開放網絡上搜索、收集證據並通過延伸推理得出答案，是前沿語言模型的一個突出應用案例。前沿深度研究產品在現有基準測試中得分很高，使得僅僅通過當前評估數據來區分它們的能力變得困難。我們引入了DeepWeb-Bench，一個比現有基準測試難度更大的深度研究基準。難度來自數據本身的三個特性：每個任務都需要大量的證據收集、跨來源的調和和長期的多步推導。我們將這三個難點表示為四個能力家族（檢索、推導、推理和校準），並按家族報告結果。每個參考答案都附有一個來源來源記錄，包含四個披露級別和可用的跨來源檢查，使得得分更容易根據基礎證據進行審計。我們在九個前沿模型上評估了DeepWeb-Bench，並報告了三個發現：（1）檢索不是瓶頸，因為檢索失敗僅佔錯誤的12-14%，而推導和校準失敗則佔超過70%；（2）強模型和弱模型以質量不同的方式失敗，強模型的錯誤主要由不完整的推導主導，而弱模型則由幻覺精度主導；（3）模型在不同領域中表現出真正的專業化，跨模型的一致性僅為rho = 0.61，逐案不一致達到18.8個百分點。公共基準發布包括數據、評分標準和評估代碼。
2605.21482.author: Sixiong Xie et.al.
2605.21482.authors: Sixiong Xie, Zhuofan Shi, Haiyang Shen, Jiuzheng Wang, Siqi Zhong, Mugeng Liu, Chongyang Pan, Peilun Jia, Baoqing Sun, Xiang Jing, Yun Ma
